zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Ellis於1503年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Thomas Ellis29歲，母親Agnes Marshall32歲。他與Belinda Masterson在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1591年在他的家鄉享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Ellis于1503年出生在英国史洛普爾时，他的父亲Thomas Ellis29岁，母亲Agnes Marshall32岁。他与Belinda Masterson在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1591年在他的家乡享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Ellis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Elis, an Old French vernacular form of Elias, the Latin and New Testament Greek form of Hebrew Eliyahu; see Elijah and compare Elias , Lias , Ely .
English: possibly in some instances from the Middle English female personal name Elice, a pet form of Elizabeth .

Welsh: from Elis, a shortened form of the Welsh personal name Elisse (earlier Elisedd, a derivative of elus ‘kindly, benevolent’). As usual in Welsh, the stress in Elisse is on the penultimate syllable -li-, which shifts to initial El- when the name is shortened to Elis. It later became confused with Ellis in 1 above.

variants.name: Ellison
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Ellis (Old Testament Elijah) + -son.
English: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Elissent, Elisant, ancient Germanic Elisind.

Scottish: sometimes a post-medieval variant of Allison , which is mainly concentrated in northern England and southwestern Scotland. There is a similar Scottish variation between Alison and Elison as female personal names.

variants.name: Ely
meanings: English: habitational name from Ely, a cathedral city on an island in the fens north of Cambridge, so named from Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + gē ‘district’.
English, French, and Breton (Finistère): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Elie, Hely (Elijah in the King James Bible); see Ellis and Elias .
English: variant of   Healey  .

variants.name: Eales
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Ellis , or, alternatively, a variant of Ell , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In Devon the name may also be a variant of Heales, with loss of initial H-, itself a variant of Heal or Heel, with post-medieval excrescent -s, or a variant of Hales .

variants.name: Elcock
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name (H)elecoc, commonly a pet form of (H)elie, itself a pet form of Ellis (from Latin Elias), but sometimes also a Middle English pet form of the female name Ellen + the hypocoristic suffix -cok.

variants.name: Elliott
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Eliot, a pet form of the Old Testament name Elijah, rendered in Greek as Ēlias and in Old French as Élie + the diminutive suffix -ot; compare Ellis . The name Aylett may in some cases also have been confused with or absorbed into Elliott.
Scottish: late variant of   Elwood  .

Scottish (of Breton origin): perhaps, as some members of the Elliott clan believe, a Scottish variant of the Breton surname Elleouet, a habitational name from one of the hamlets named Allegot in Finistère.

variants.name: Bellis
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Elisedd ‘son of Elisedd’ (see Ellis ).

English: possibly also a nickname from bellis, the regular form of bellows until the 16th century (see Bellows ). The form bellis persisted generally until the 16th century and much later in various dialects.

Italian: patronymic from the personal name Bello . It is formed with the Latin ablative plural suffix -is imparting the broader sense ‘belonging to, of’, in this case ‘member of the Belli family’ (compare Belli ). Compare also De Bellis .

variants.name: Elles
meanings: English: variant either of   Ellis   or   Ells  .
Dutch and German: variant of   Ellens  .

variants.name: Elijah
meanings: Welsh, Jewish, and African American: from the personal name Elijah, the usual English transliteration in the King James Bible of the Hebrew name Eliyahu ‘Jehovah is God’, the name of an Old Testament prophet (compare Elias , Ellis ). As a Welsh surname, this is a comparatively late adoption of the personal name, adopted after Old Testament personal names became popular among Nonconformists.

variants.name: Ells
meanings: English (London and Kent): variant of Ellis , or a variant of Ell , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Ellis was born in 1503, in Shropshire, England, his father, Thomas Ellis, was 29 and his mother, Agnes Marshall, was 32. He married Belinda Masterson in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1591, in his hometown, at the age of 88, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Ellis est né en 1503, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Ellis, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Marshall, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Belinda Masterson à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1591, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Ellis 1503 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Ellis 29 und seine Mutter Agnes Marshall 32. Er hat in London, Middlesex, England Belinda Masterson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1591 im Alter von 88 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Ellis è nato il nel 1503 nel Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Ellis, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Marshall, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Belinda Masterson nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1591, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Ellisが1503年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Ellisは29歳，母Agnes Marshallは32歳であった。イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでBelinda Mastersonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1591年に故郷で88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Ellis(이)가 1503년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Ellis(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Marshall(은)는 32세였다. 그는 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Belinda Masterson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 그의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Ellis nasceu em 1503, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Ellis, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Marshall, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Belinda Masterson em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1591, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Ellis родился в 1503 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Ellis было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Marshall, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Belinda Masterson в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1591 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Ellis nació en 1503, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Ellis, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes Marshall, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Belinda Masterson en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1591, en su pueblo, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
